extraction.one_line_summary: VALVERDE Alejandro controlled by Movistar team pacing then attacked final 200m of Mur de Huy 10% section, fifth career win.
tactical_patterns: JUNGELS Bob bridged to DE MARCHI Alessandro at second Mur passage then soloed 11km out, revealing unsustainable energy expenditure pattern.
Movistar and Lotto Soudal dual pacing control neutralized six-rider break before second Mur passage, preventing any cooperation zones.
GAUDU David attacked 200m from finish on steepest Mur section, timing too early against VALVERDE's late acceleration strength.

rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: fifth Fleche win, 10th season victory pre-37th birthday shows exceptional Mur de Huy repeatability pattern
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: third podium in four years signals consistent Mur finishing strength despite never winning
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: biggest classic result suggests BMC rider's Mur climbing improving toward podium-contention tier
rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: neutral: strong enough to solo 11km but caught final climb reveals misjudged effort distribution
rider_signals.GAUDU David: neutral: attacked 200m out but lacked finishing punch, positioning correct but acceleration deficit exposed
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: neutral: led second Mur passage but couldn't sustain when JUNGELS countered, showing one-dimensional pacing
